prompt: Create a polished anime-style full-body illustration of a fashionable young woman with long silvery-gray twin-tails walking toward the viewer on a narrow rural village road on a bright summer day, with her face intentionally obscured by a soft square blur. She has voluminous wavy twin-tails tied high, a purple rose hair accessory, pale skin, a black choker, a black scrunchie bracelet, and glossy legs with a black floral vine tattoo on one calf. She wears an oversized slightly translucent wet-look white T-shirt with the bold text HIMAINU printed across the chest and a simple emoticon-style face underneath, paired with a short black frilly skirt with pale lavender ruffle trim and black Mary Jane platform shoes. In her left hand she holds a black leash attached to a small cream-colored curly toy poodle walking beside her, tongue out and looking cheerful. The setting is a scenic Japanese countryside village with rice fields, traditional wooden houses, roadside flowers, utility poles, and forested mountains; include a dirt-and-gravel path, irrigation channels, lush green fields, deep blue sky, bright white cumulus clouds, strong midday sunlight, crisp shadows, vibrant saturated colors, and highly detailed anime background art. Use a vertical composition, eye-level perspective, centered character, dog in the lower left foreground, cinematic summer atmosphere, clean linework, delicate fabric highlights, detailed hair strands, and rich environmental depth.
